company.name: Nektar Therapeutics
company.subtitle: Post-Phase 2b AD/AA · Phase 3 ZENITH-AD starting Q2 2026 · BLA target 2029

market.notes: AD market ~$15-20B (Dupixent alone >$13B). REZOLVE-AD Phase 2b (393pts): primary met all doses (p<0.001). Maintenance (Feb 2026): durable Q4W and Q12W, EASI-100 18-22% at wk52, deepening response. No conjunctivitis/oral herpes signal vs JAKi. BLA target 2029. Competitors: Dupixent, Rinvoq, Cibinqo, Adbry, Ebglyss.

us.wtpPct.note: US WTP 55% -- commercial payor access + formulary coverage.

row.wtpPct.note: ROW WTP 10% -- limited reimbursement outside US/EU/Japan.

us.priceK.note: US avg treatment cost $60K/yr (market blended across modalities).

eu.priceK.note: EU avg treatment cost $30K/yr (market blended across modalities).

row.priceK.note: ROW avg treatment cost $12K/yr (market blended across modalities).

penPct.note: Peak penetration 8% -- refine per competitive landscape.

market.notes: AA market ~$3-5B. High-dose: 28.2% SALT reduction vs 11.2% placebo (36wk). Stat sig achieved with exclusions. Competitors: Olumiant, Litfulo (both JAKi with safety concerns). Treg MOA potentially safer long-term.

us.wtpPct.note: US WTP 55% -- commercial payor access + formulary coverage.

eu.priceK.note: EU avg treatment cost $25K/yr (market blended across modalities).

row.priceK.note: ROW avg treatment cost $10K/yr (market blended across modalities).

penPct.note: Peak penetration 6% -- refine per competitive landscape.

market.notes: Early stage. Treg restoration could preserve beta-cell function. Large unmet need but uncertain regulatory path. Option value.

row.priceK.note: ROW avg treatment cost $3K/yr (market blended across modalities).

market.notes: IL-15 agonist to enhance cancer immunotherapy. Combo trials with Bavencio, Imfinzi, Breyanzi, TIL. Phase 2/3 with CAR-T in LBCL ongoing. Non-core but optionality.

us.wtpPct.note: US WTP 50% -- commercial payor access + formulary coverage.

row.wtpPct.note: ROW WTP 8% -- limited reimbursement outside US/EU/Japan.

us.priceK.note: US market blended avg $410K/yr across treatment modalities.

eu.priceK.note: EU CLL/NHL blended: ~55-60% of US across modalities.

row.priceK.note: ROW market blended avg $150K/yr across treatment modalities.

penPct.note: Peak penetration 1.5% -- refine per competitive landscape.

mega_bear.narrative: ZENITH-AD Phase 3 fails — Treg approach dead — another Nektar reinvention
events: ✗ ZENITH-AD Phase 3 misses primary endpoint
✗ Treg stimulation doesn't translate from Phase 2 to Phase 3
✗ AA and T1D programs shelved — pipeline collapse
→ $720M cash (~$25/share) is the stock, market assigns zero pipeline value

bear.narrative: Phase 3 disappoints or efficacy gap vs Dupixent too wide
events: ✗ ZENITH-AD Phase 3 fails to replicate Phase 2b
✗ Efficacy gap vs Dupixent too wide for market adoption
✗ AA data insufficient for pivotal
→ Re-rates to cash + residual pipeline

base.narrative: AD Phase 3 confirms — safety + quarterly dosing differentiate
events: ✓ ZENITH-AD replicates Phase 2b efficacy
✓ Q12W maintenance differentiates vs Dupixent Q2W
~ AA advances to Phase 3
→ BLA 2029, launch 2030 as best-in-class Treg

bull.narrative: Treg platform validated across derm + autoimmune — M&A
events: ✓ AD Phase 3 best-in-class safety + competitive efficacy
✓ Quarterly dosing wins formulary preference
✓ AA Phase 3 — Treg platform validated
✓ M&A target for big pharma

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Treg platform creates new therapeutic class — AD + AA + T1D + lupus — Pfizer acquires
events: ✓ ZENITH-AD best-in-class: quarterly dosing + disease modification
✓ AA Phase 3 positive — first Treg therapy approved in derm
✓ T1D Phase 2 shows beta-cell preservation — disease-modifying
✓ Platform extends to lupus, MS — Pfizer acquires for Treg franchise at $150+

lastData.title: REZOLVE-AD maintenance + AAD 2026 presentations
points: 36-week maintenance: durable with monthly AND quarterly dosing
EASI-100 (complete clearance): 18-22% at week 52, deepening over time
No conjunctivitis, oral herpes, malignancy (vs JAKi safety edge)
AAD: consistent efficacy across moderate + severe (vIGA 3 and 4)
AA PoC: 28.2% vs 11.2% SALT reduction (high dose, 36wk)
Phase 3 ZENITH-AD planned Q2 2026, BLA target 2029

nextCatalyst.title: Phase 3 ZENITH-AD initiation (mod-severe AD)
thresholds: Phase 3 design and primary endpoint disclosure
Dose confirmed from Phase 2b (24µg/kg Q2W → Q4W/Q12W maint.)
Also: T1D Phase 2 data, NKTR-255 CAR-T combo

risks: Phase 3 still 3+ years from BLA — long execution timeline
Dupixent dominates ($13B+) — must show competitive efficacy
1000% rally — massive pullback risk on any stumble
Phase 2b→3 translation risk (393pts may not predict pivotal)
SC injection — oral JAKi may be preferred despite safety edge
AA stat sig required exclusions — signal weaker than headline
No pipeline revenue — legacy royalties $55M/yr declining

catalysts.title: REZOLVE-AA 52-week alopecia areata data
catalysts._rationale: Management confirmed 52-week AA data expected in April 2026
